ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the competition */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., shot, free kick, header) */,
  "sub_event_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of event (e.g., shot on target, shot off target) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the match the event occurred in */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the match the event occurred at */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_locations" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the event location */,
  "y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the event location */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the goal */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the shot */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expected_goals" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "xg" REAL /* Expected goals value for the event */,
  "xg_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the expected goals value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the event */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stadiums" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium the match was played in */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_display" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the event (e.g., player name, event type) */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Order of the event display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_kicks" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "freekick" INTEGER /* Free kick indicator (0 or 1) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headers" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "header" INTEGER /* Header indicator (0 or 1) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Goal indicator (0 or 1) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
